reference: Hello! My mother is sixty-nine years old. She had a stroke, two hip replacements, and arthritis. I give her Instaflex, she goes to physiotherapy and other painkillers. I do not know how to help her; she is always in pain. All her joints are swollen. If you can advise, I would appreciate it. Thank you in advance. Tarana.
text: Hello, my mother is fifty-nine years old. She had a stroke. She hit replacement. She is a writer. I give her a stick. She goes to physiotherapy and other painkillers. We do not know how to help her. She is always in pain. All her joints are swollen. If you can advise, I would appreciate it. Thank you in advance, Serrano.
